    "import pandas as pd\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "import os\n",
    "from sklearn.model_selection import GroupKFold, cross_val_predict\n",
    "from sklearn.metrics import accuracy_score\n",
    "from sklearn.compose import ColumnTransformer\n",
    "from sklearn.pipeline import Pipeline\n",
    "from sklearn.impute import SimpleImputer\n",
    "from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler, OneHotEncoder\n",
    "from lightgbm import LGBMClassifier\n",
    "from catboost import CatBoostClassifier\n",
    "\n",
    "# --- 1. FEATURE ENGINEERING FUNCTION ---\n",
    "\n",
    "def feature_engineer_spaceship_titanic(df):\n",
    "    \"\"\"Performs domain-specific feature engineering and extracts Group ID.\"\"\"\n",
    "    df = df.copy()\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # 1. Cabin Decomposition\n",
    "    if 'Cabin' in df.columns:\n",
    "        df[['Cabin_Deck', 'Cabin_Num', 'Cabin_Side']] = df['Cabin'].str.split('/', expand=True)\n",
    "    else:\n",
    "        df['Cabin_Deck'] = np.nan\n",
    "        df['Cabin_Side'] = np.nan\n",
    "\n",
    "    # 2. Total Spending Aggregation\n",
    "    spending_cols = ['RoomService', 'FoodCourt', 'ShoppingMall', 'Spa', 'VRDeck']\n",
    "    df['TotalSpent'] = df[spending_cols].fillna(0).sum(axis=1)\n",
    "\n",
    "    # 3. Group Size Extraction\n",
    "    if 'PassengerId' in df.columns:\n",
    "        # Extract the Group ID (first part of PassengerId)\n",
    "        df['Group_ID'] = df['PassengerId'].apply(lambda x: x.split('_')[0] if pd.notna(x) else None)\n",
    "        \n",
    "        # Calculate Group Size\n",
    "        group_sizes = df.groupby('Group_ID')['Group_ID'].transform('count')\n",
    "        df['Group_Size'] = group_sizes.astype('float64')\n",
    "    else:\n",
    "        df['Group_Size'] = 1.0\n",
    "        df['Group_ID'] = 'G0'\n",
    "\n",
    "    return df\n",
    "\n",
    "# --- 2. PREPROCESSOR DEFINITIONS ---\n",
    "\n",
    "# Feature lists combined after feature engineering\n",
    "numerical_features = ['Age', 'RoomService', 'FoodCourt', 'ShoppingMall', 'Spa', 'VRDeck', 'TotalSpent', 'Group_Size']\n",
    "categorical_features = ['HomePlanet', 'CryoSleep', 'Destination', 'VIP', 'Cabin_Deck', 'Cabin_Side']\n",
    "\n",
    "# Numerical Pipeline (Scaling + Median Imputation) - Shared\n",
    "numeric_transformer = Pipeline(steps=[\n",
    "    ('imputer', SimpleImputer(strategy='median')),\n",
    "    ('scaler', StandardScaler())\n",
    "])\n",
    "\n",
    "# Categorical Pipeline (Mode Imputation + OHE) - Used for LGBM\n",
    "categorical_transformer = Pipeline(steps=[\n",
    "    ('imputer', SimpleImputer(strategy='most_frequent')),\n",
    "    ('onehot', OneHotEncoder(handle_unknown='ignore', sparse_output=False))\n",
    "])\n",
    "\n",
    "# CatBoost Optimized Categorical Pipeline: Only impute, keep as strings\n",
    "cb_categorical_transformer = Pipeline(steps=[\n",
    "    ('imputer', SimpleImputer(strategy='most_frequent', fill_value='Unknown'))\n",
    "])\n",
    "\n",
    "# 1. Preprocessor for LGBM (OHE required)\n",
    "preprocessor_fe = ColumnTransformer(\n",
    "    transformers=[\n",
    "        ('num', numeric_transformer, numerical_features),\n",
    "        ('cat', categorical_transformer, categorical_features)\n",
    "    ],\n",
    "    remainder='drop' \n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "# 2. Preprocessor for CatBoost (Categorical features handled natively)\n",
    "cb_preprocessor = ColumnTransformer(\n",
    "    transformers=[\n",
    "        ('num', numeric_transformer, numerical_features),\n",
    "        ('cat', cb_categorical_transformer, categorical_features)\n",
    "    ],\n",
    "    remainder='drop' \n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "# --- 3. MODEL PIPELINE DEFINITIONS ---\n",
    "\n",
    "LGBM_model = LGBMClassifier(\n",
    "    random_state=42, \n",
    "    n_estimators=1000, \n",
    "    learning_rate=0.03, \n",
    "    num_leaves=31, \n",
    "    max_depth=-1, \n",
    "    verbose=-1\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "CATBOOST_model = CatBoostClassifier(\n",
    "    iterations=1000, \n",
    "    learning_rate=0.03, \n",
    "    depth=6, \n",
    "    loss_function='Logloss', \n",
    "    eval_metric='Accuracy', \n",
    "    random_seed=42, \n",
    "    verbose=0, \n",
    "    cat_features=categorical_features\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "# LGBM Pipeline (Uses OHE preprocessor)\n",
    "lgbm_pipeline = Pipeline(steps=[\n",
    "    ('preprocessor', preprocessor_fe),\n",
    "    ('classifier', LGBM_model)\n",
    "])\n",
    "\n",
    "# CatBoost Pipeline (Uses string/native handler preprocessor)\n",
    "cb_pipeline = Pipeline(steps=[\n",
    "    ('preprocessor', cb_preprocessor),\n",
    "    ('classifier', CATBOOST_model)\n",
    "])\n",
    "\n",
    "# --- 4. EVALUATION AND PREDICTION FUNCTIONS ---\n",
    "\n",
    "N_SPLITS = 5\n",
    "gkf = GroupKFold(n_splits=N_SPLITS)\n",
    "\n",
    "def evaluate_ensemble_group_cv(X_fe, y, groups, lgbm_pipeline, cb_pipeline):\n",
    "    \"\"\"Calculates the GroupKFold cross-validated accuracy for the soft-voting ensemble.\"\"\"\n",
    "    \n",
    "    print(f\"Starting {N_SPLITS}-Fold Group CV evaluation using GroupKFold...\")\n",
    "\n",
    "    # Note: Setting n_jobs=1 for stability with complex pipelines and external libraries (LGBM/CatBoost)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Get cross-validated prediction probabilities for LGBM (Pipeline 1)\n",
    "    lgbm_proba = cross_val_predict(\n",
    "        lgbm_pipeline, \n",
    "        X_fe, \n",
    "        y, \n",
    "        cv=gkf, \n",
    "        groups=groups, \n",
    "        method='predict_proba', \n",
    "        n_jobs=1 \n",
    "    )[:, 1]\n",
    "\n",
    "    # Get cross-validated prediction probabilities for CatBoost (Pipeline 2)\n",
    "    cb_proba = cross_val_predict(\n",
    "        cb_pipeline, \n",
    "        X_fe, \n",
    "        y, \n",
    "        cv=gkf, \n",
    "        groups=groups, \n",
    "        method='predict_proba', \n",
    "        n_jobs=1\n",
    "    )[:, 1]\n",
    "\n",
    "    # Ensemble: Simple Averaging\n",
    "    ensembled_proba = (lgbm_proba + cb_proba) / 2\n",
    "    ensembled_predictions = (ensembled_proba > 0.5)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Calculate Accuracy\n",
    "    cv_accuracy = accuracy_score(y, ensembled_predictions)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    print(f\"Individual LGBM CV Accuracy: {accuracy_score(y, (lgbm_proba > 0.5)):.4f}\")\n",
    "    print(f\"Individual CatBoost CV Accuracy: {accuracy_score(y, (cb_proba > 0.5)):.4f}\")\n",
    "    print(f\"\\nEnsemble (LGBM+CB) Group CV Accuracy: {cv_accuracy:.4f}\")\n",
    "    \n",
    "    return cv_accuracy\n",
    "\n",
    "def fit_and_predict_ensemble(X_train_fe, y_train, X_test_fe):\n",
    "    \"\"\"Fits both pipelines on full training data and generates ensembled test predictions.\"\"\"\n",

    "    \n",
    "    print(\"Fitting CatBoost pipeline...\")\n",
    "    cb_pipeline.fit(X_train_fe, y_train)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    print(\"Generating predictions...\")\n",
    "    \n",
    "    lgbm_preds_proba = lgbm_pipeline.predict_proba(X_test_fe)[:, 1]\n",
    "    cb_preds_proba = cb_pipeline.predict_proba(X_test_fe)[:, 1]\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Simple Averaging Ensemble\n",
    "    ensembled_proba = (lgbm_preds_proba + cb_preds_proba) / 2\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Final prediction (Boolean)\n",
    "    final_predictions = (ensembled_proba > 0.5)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    return final_predictions\n",
    "\n",
    "# --- 5. MAIN EXECUTION BLOCK ---\n",
    "\n",
    "if __name__ == '__main__':\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Check for required files\n",
    "    if not os.path.exists('train.csv') or not os.path.exists('test.csv'):\n",
    "        print(\"Error: train.csv or test.csv not found. Please ensure data files are in the working directory.\")\")\n",
    "        exit()\n",
    "\n",
    "    # Load Data\n",
    "    train_df = pd.read_csv('train.csv')\n",
    "    test_df = pd.read_csv('test.csv')\n",
    "\n",
    "    # Prepare Data\n",
    "    y_train = train_df['Transported']\n",
    "    X_train_raw = train_df.drop('Transported', axis=1)\n",
    "    X_test_raw = test_df.copy()\n",
    "\n",
    "    # Store PassengerId for submission\n",
    "    test_passenger_ids = X_test_raw['PassengerId']\n",
    "\n",
    "    # 1. Feature Engineering\n",
    "    print(\"Applying Feature Engineering to Train and Test sets...\")\n",
    "    X_train_fe = feature_engineer_spaceship_titanic(X_train_raw)\n",
    "    X_test_fe = feature_engineer_spaceship_titanic(X_test_raw)\n",
    "\n",
    "    # 2. Define Groups for CV (Crucial for avoiding leakage)\n",
    "    train_groups = X_train_fe['Group_ID']\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # --- Evaluation ---\n",
    "    \n",
    "    final_cv_score = evaluate_ensemble_group_cv(\n",
    "        X_train_fe, \n",
    "        y_train, \n",
    "        train_groups, \n",
    "        lgbm_pipeline, \n",
    "        cb_pipeline\n",
    "    )\n",
    "    \n",
    "    print(f\"\\n--- Final Ensemble Group CV Accuracy: {final_cv_score:.4f} ---\")\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # --- Final Prediction and Submission ---\n",
    "    \n",
    "    final_predictions = fit_and_predict_ensemble(X_train_fe, y_train, X_test_fe)\n",
